discoveries.description: TRAE IDE supports CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md natively, allowing seamless rule integration.
TRAE uses .trae/rules/ directory with YAML frontmatter (alwaysApply, description) for granular rule control.

patternsLearned.name: Hybrid Rule Management
patternsLearned.description: Maintain both .claude/ and .trae/ rules to support multiple IDEs simultaneously without conflict.
patternsLearned.applicability: Projects used in both TRAE and Claude Code environments.

decisionsMade.decision: Adopt Hybrid Approach for AIOS Rules
decisionsMade.rationale: Ensured compatibility with both legacy (Claude Code) and new (TRAE) environments without data loss.
Separated core rules (always apply) from specialized rules like MCP (apply intelligently) to reduce context window usage.
